intended_use: The diagnostic ultrasound system and probes are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intraoperative
intended_use_full: The diagnostic ultrasound system and probes are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intraoperative, Pediatric, Small Organ, Neonatal Cephalic, Adult Cephalic, Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Muscular-Skeletal (Conventional, Superficial), Urology, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric, Trans-esophageal(Cardiac) and Peripheral vessel.
target_condition: Peripheral nerve localization for pain management and regional anesthesia procedures
ground_truth: Manual nerve delineation by anesthesiologists with >10 years experience in pain management; verification by independent expert review with corrections made if disagreement occurred
other_metrics: Detection speed: 14.49 fps (95% CI: 13.86, 15.11); Segmentation speed: 10.44 fps (95% CI: 10.03, 10.85); Dice similarity coefficient (segmentation): 90.44% (95% CI: 86.19, 94.69); 95% Hausdorff distance excluding bone: 18.69 pixels (95% CI: 9.21, 28.17); FR error rate: 6.11% (95% CI: 5.10, 7.12); CSA error rate: 9.75% (95% CI: 8.54, 10.96)
